stemHtml: An airway is marked 3500T 2100 a. This indicates that…

options.a: the airway is a low level link route 2100 ft 3500 ft MSL.
options.b: the minimum obstacle clearance altitude MOCA is 3500 ft.
options.c: the airway base is 3500 ft MSL.
options.d: the minimum enroute altitude MEA is 3500 ft.
